title: AclPolicy
description: Document-level authorization attached to each governed document. Evaluated by ikip-authz BEFORE any retrieval. Deny-by-default.

owner.description: Information owner accountable for this document.

sites.description: Sites/facilities this document is scoped to.

roles_allowed.description: Roles permitted to retrieve this document.

source_of_truth.description: The upstream system that owns this ACL (e.g. EDMS group). Drives synchronization and staleness detection.
source_of_truth.$comment: See docs/safety/acl-sync-and-freshness.md — freshness is the highest-risk open design area.

synced_at.description: When this ACL was last reconciled with its source_of_truth.

max_staleness_seconds.description: If (now - synced_at) exceeds this, authz treats the ACL as stale and denies or forces re-check.
